description: Provides context for how a Society grew and flourished. Use with History and Society Growth Meaning tables for additional inspiration. Part of the Society Crafter system.

descriptionTranslations.en: Provides context for how a Society grew and flourished. Use with History and Society Growth Meaning tables for additional inspiration. Part of the Society Crafter system.

entries.result: Organic Growth: The place simply continued to grow, investing in what got it established in the first place. There is no critical catalyst that helped

resultTranslations.en: Organic Growth: The place simply continued to grow, investing in what got it established in the first place. There is no critical catalyst that helped

entries.result: Crisis: A crisis struck that threatened the Society's existence. They rose to meet the challenge, succeeded, and experienced new growth

resultTranslations.en: Crisis: A crisis struck that threatened the Society's existence. They rose to meet the challenge, succeeded, and experienced new growth

entries.result: Hero: An individual is responsible for their growth. This hero might have been a visionary leader, inventor, industrialist, or great artist

resultTranslations.en: Hero: An individual is responsible for their growth. This hero might have been a visionary leader, inventor, industrialist, or great artist

entries.result: Opportunity: Something happened that unexpectedly placed whatever the Society produced into great demand

resultTranslations.en: Opportunity: Something happened that unexpectedly placed whatever the Society produced into great demand

entries.result: Discovery: A discovery of some kind helped propel the Society forward. Maybe it was scientific or one of exploration

resultTranslations.en: Discovery: A discovery of some kind helped propel the Society forward. Maybe it was scientific or one of exploration

entries.result: Community: Something about the population itself helped the Society grow. Perhaps a cultural movement or an influx of immigrants

resultTranslations.en: Community: Something about the population itself helped the Society grow. Perhaps a cultural movement or an influx of immigrants

entries.description: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with the other Meaning words rolled

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll on Mythic's Action Meaning tables and include them with the other Meaning words rolled
